---
title: "Main Page"
format: html
---

This page summarizes all data processing steps related to the fieldwork conducted on the Banc d’Arguin seagrass meadow in March 2026.

The objective of this work is to improve the ICE CREAMS classification model ([ICE CREAMS python repository](https://github.com/BedeFfinian/ICE_CREAMS), [ICE CREAMS Studio](https://github.com/SigOiry/ICE_CREAMS_STUDIO)), use to identify seagrass pixel from Sentinel-2 imagery. This model has been proven to be accurate for European meadows ([Davies et al. 2024a](https://doi.org/10.1038/s43247-024-01543-z), [Davies et al. 2024b](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rse.2024.114340), [Davies et al. 2025](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rse.2025.115116)), but personal observations suggest that it is less accurate for the Mauritanian meadow. 
Several axis of improvement are being explored, including:

  -  Atmospheric correction of Sentinel-2 imagery : It seams that on some Sentinel-2 images, the atmospheric correction is not optimal, which can lead to misclassification of seagrass pixels. We will first test the accuracy of the Sen2Cor Atmospheric Correction natively applied to Sentinel-2 images, and then explore alternative atmospheric correction methods if necessary.

<style>
.home-tile-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: min(320px, 90vw);
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42)),
    url("images/atm cor.jpg");
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: cover;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}

.home-tile-button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 36px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
}
</style>

<a href="https://sigoiry.github.io/Arguin---FieldWork-Data-Processing/Atmospheric_correction.html" class="home-tile-button">Atmospheric Correction</a>
